games.headline: Washington 9, San Diego 4 — Lord (W)
games.summary: Brad Lord pitched 2.0 innings, allowing 0 earned runs with 2 strikeouts, leading Washington past San Diego 9-4 at Nationals Park. Michael King lasted 6.0 innings, giving up 5 earned runs, 2 strikeouts, 1 walks. Offensively for Washington: D.Millas homered with 2 RBI; L.Jr. went 2-for-4 with 2 RBI. F.Jr., M.Machado, X.Bogaerts went deep for San Diego. Clayton Beeter closed it out for the save.
